name: Lifelong Representations: A Survey on Continual Self-Supervised Learning for Vision Models
summary: arXiv:2607.09785v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Traditionally, continual learning has assumed access to labeled data, yet many real-world applications -- such as lifelong robotics -- require mode...
description: arXiv:2607.09785v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Traditionally, continual learning has assumed access to labeled data, yet many real-world applications -- such as lifelong robotics -- require models to adapt continuously from unlabeled streams. This has led to the development of continual self-supervised learning (CSSL), a rapidly growing area that lacks a dedicated, systematic review. In this...
author: Sergi Masip, Alicja Dobrzeniecka, Jonathan Swinnen, Joachim Collin, Bart{\l}omiej Twardowski, Szymon {\L}ukasik, Tinne Tuytelaars
